name: WORKFLOW 2 — Multi-Step Agent: Follow-Up Listener & Re-Evaluator

nodes.name: Gmail: Watch Candidate Replies
nodes.notes: MULTI-STEP AGENT TRIGGER: Polls inbox every minute for replies to the 'Action Required' follow-up emails. Filters for unread emails with 'Re: Your Application' subject. This closes the agent loop — candidate replies trigger re-evaluation.

nodes.name: Extract Reply & Session Context
nodes.notes: Parses the candidate's reply email. Extracts the session ID from the footer of the original follow-up email (so we can match it to the pending application in Sheets). Detects if an updated CV was attached.

nodes.name: Sheets: Find Pending Application
nodes.notes: AGENT MEMORY: Looks up the candidate's email in the 'Pending Follow-Up' sheet to retrieve their original job role, session ID, and submission details. This is how the agent remembers context across multiple steps.

nodes.name: Merge Reply with Original Context
nodes.notes: Combines the candidate's reply with their original application context from Sheets memory. Builds an enriched content block that Gemini uses for re-evaluation. This gives Gemini full context: what was missing, what was provided, and the original role.

nodes.name: Has Updated CV?
nodes.notes: If the candidate attached an updated CV, extract its text. If they just replied with text info, use the reply body directly. Both paths converge at Gemini re-evaluation.

nodes.name: Extract Updated CV Text
nodes.notes: Extracts text from the newly attached CV file for full re-evaluation.

nodes.name: Parse Re-Evaluation Result
nodes.notes: Parses Gemini's re-evaluation JSON. Flags result as a re-evaluation so downstream sheets logging notes it appropriately.

nodes.name: Sheets: Update Pending → Resolved
nodes.notes: MEMORY UPDATE: Updates the Pending Follow-Up row with the final decision. The agent now considers this application resolved. The row shows the journey: incomplete → follow-up sent → re-evaluated → final decision.

nodes.name: Send to Decision Pipeline
nodes.notes: Passes the re-evaluated result back into Workflow 1's decision pipeline (router → email → sheets → calendar). Reuses all the same downstream logic rather than duplicating it.
